case_title: RITA CHOIT ADLER VS. ANTHONY'S SHOE SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $955.53 FILED BY ADLER, RITA CHOIT AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY'S SHOE SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED JAN-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ANTHONY'S SHOE SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADLER, RITA CHOIT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANTHONY'S SHOE SERVICE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
